root.rep_text: เล่มทะเบียนสมาชิก

share_amount.text: หุ้นรายเดือน

approve_date.text: วันที่รายการ

root.sql: select sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,(select prename from sc_mem_m_ucf_prename where prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code)||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name||' '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname as member_name ,sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_amount ,sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.spouse_name ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date,'dd/mm/yyyy') as approve_date ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.position_code , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.total_loan_int ,(select sc_mem_m_member_work_info.position_code from sc_mem_m_member_work_info where sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as position_code ,(select sc_mem_m_member_work_info.position_long from sc_mem_m_member_work_info where sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as position_long ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.marriage_status ,(case sc_mem_m_membership_registered.marriage_status when '0' then 'โสด' when '1' then 'สมรส' when '2' then 'ม่าย' when '3' then 'หย่าร้าง' end) as marriage_status_name ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_pres(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as address ,pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as age_life_text ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.resignation_approve_date,'dd/mm/yyyy') as resignation_approve_date ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_desc ,sc_mem_m_member_work_info.salary_amount ,sc_mem_m_member_work_info.salary_id ,decode(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code,'0','ปกติ','พ้นสภาพ') as member_status_code from sc_mem_m_membership_registered ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group ,sc_mem_m_share_mem ,sc_mem_m_member_work_info ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type /*WHERE*/ --and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date between '01/06/2020' and '30/06/2020' order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no

r_ktm_mem_share_loan_card_share.sql:
select sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.seq_no ,nvl(sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.period,0) as period ,sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.share_value --*sc_mem_m_ucf_share_item_type.sign_flag as share_value ,sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.share_stock ,sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.item_type --KTM สอ.กทม. กรณีรหัสรายการ RM ,RC วันที่รายการให้ใช้ entry_date แสดงผล ,FPB_GET_SHARE_OPERATE_DATE(sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.membership_no , sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.seq_no) as operate_date
from sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail ,sc_mem_m_ucf_share_item_type where sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.item_type = sc_mem_m_ucf_share_item_type.item_type and sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.membership_no = {0} and sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.operate_date between '!approve_date_1!' and '!approve_date_2!' /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.seq_no ,sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.share_stock

r_ktm_mem_share_loan_card_norm.sql: select sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code, --KTM สอ.กทม. กรณีรหัสรายการ RM ,RC วันที่รายการให้ใช้ entry_date แสดงผล FPB_GET_LOAN_PAYMENT_DATE(sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.seq_no) as loan_payment_date , sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.principal_balance, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.interest_amout, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.payment_amount, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.period, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.seq_no, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.item_type_code, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract from sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail, sc_lon_m_rule where ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type ) and ( sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code <> '01' ) --and (sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.status <> '1' ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = {0} ) and (sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_payment_date between '!approve_date_1!' and '!approve_date_2!') /*WHERE*/ order by sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_contract_no ,sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ,sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.seq_no

r_ktm_mem_share_loan_card_emer.sql: select sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code, --KTM สอ.กทม. กรณีรหัสรายการ RM ,RC วันที่รายการให้ใช้ entry_date แสดงผล FPB_GET_LOAN_PAYMENT_DATE(sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.seq_no) as loan_payment_date , sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.principal_balance, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.payment_amount, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.interest_amout, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.item_type_code, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.seq_no, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.period, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract from sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail, sc_lon_m_rule where ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type ) and ( sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '01' ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = {0} ) and (sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_payment_date between '!approve_date_1!' and '!approve_date_2!' ) /*WHERE*/ order by sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_contract_no ,sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ,sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.seq_no

r_ktm_mem_share_loan_card_coll.sql:
select sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
from sc_lon_m_contract_coll, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename, sc_lon_m_loan_card
where ( sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no =sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no) and ( ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no = {0} ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0') and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 ) )

r_ktm_mem_share_loan_card_concern.sql:
SELECT sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_description, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_group(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no) as group_ref_own_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no) as member_name
FROM sc_lon_m_contract_coll, sc_lon_m_loan_card
WHERE ( trim(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no) = trim(sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no)) and ( ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = {0} ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' ) AND ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 ) )

r_ktm_mem_share_loan_card_return.sql:
SELECT sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no, sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receipt_no, sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_year, sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month, sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.seq_no, sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receipt_return_date
, ( select sum( unkeep_money_amount ) from sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det det where det.membership_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no and det.receive_year = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_year and det.receive_month = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month and det.seq_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.seq_no and det.keeping_type_code = 'MS00' ) as c_share
, ( select sum( unkeep_principal_of_loan ) from sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det det where det.membership_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no and det.receive_year = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_year and det.receive_month = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month and det.seq_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.seq_no and det.keeping_type_code = 'ML01' ) as c_emer_prin
, ( select sum( unkeep_interest ) from sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det det where det.membership_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no and det.receive_year = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_year and det.receive_month = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month and det.seq_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.seq_no and det.keeping_type_code = 'ML01' ) as c_emer_int
, ( select sum( unkeep_principal_of_loan ) from sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det det where det.membership_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no and det.receive_year = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_year and det.receive_month = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month and det.seq_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.seq_no and det.keeping_type_code = 'ML02' ) as c_norm_prin
, ( select sum( unkeep_interest ) from sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det det where det.membership_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no and det.receive_year = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_year and det.receive_month = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month and det.seq_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.seq_no and det.keeping_type_code = 'ML02' ) as c_norm_int
, ( select sum( unkeep_principal_of_loan ) from sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det det where det.membership_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no and det.receive_year = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_year and det.receive_month = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month and det.seq_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.seq_no and det.keeping_type_code = 'ML03' ) as c_spec_prin
, ( select sum( unkeep_interest ) from sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det det where det.membership_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no and det.receive_year = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_year and det.receive_month = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month and det.seq_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.seq_no and det.keeping_type_code = 'ML03' ) as c_spec_int
FROM sc_kep_t_monthly_receive WHERE 1=1 -- and ( ( sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_year = 2019 ) -- AND ( sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month = 10 ) AND ( sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receipt_status = '2' ) AND ( sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no = {0} ) GROUP BY sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no, sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_year, sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month, sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.seq_no, sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receipt_return_date , sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receipt_no
ORDER BY sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_year, sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month
